settings.heading: Same Lab. Same Results. £56 Less.
settings.subheading: We source the same active ingredients as luxury K-beauty. Then we show you exactly what's inside — concentrations included.

settings.text: We list every ingredient. Every percentage. Every time. Because honest skincare shouldn't be a luxury.

settings.heading: Clinical Actives. No Hiding.
settings.body_1: Most skincare brands list niacinamide on the label. Few will tell you it's at 0.1% — a concentration too low to do anything. SHIEH formulates at clinically active thresholds and publishes every number.
settings.body_2: The result: £24 products that outperform £80 competitors on paper and in practice. Not because we're cheaper. Because we stopped paying for the opacity.

settings.heading: No Decorative Ingredients
settings.text: Every active in every SHIEH formula sits at its clinically validated concentration. We publish the numbers. You verify them.

settings.heading: EU & ECOCERT Certified
settings.text: Third-party verified. ECOCERT certified formulas. GPSR compliant across the EU and UK. No asterisks on our safety claims.

settings.heading: Seoul Lab. Honest Lab.
settings.text: Formulated with South Korean cosmetic science — the same methodology behind the world's most effective skincare. Disclosed in full by Sora Yun.

settings.heading: Three Steps to Skincare You Can Actually Verify

settings.step_description: Read your label with confidence. Every INCI list tells a story — position 1 is the most abundant ingredient. Position 12 is a gesture. We teach you the difference.
Select the right active for your skin — not the most expensive one. With concentration knowledge, you shop on evidence. Not on packaging.
Track measurable results, not promises. 5% Niacinamide: visible texture improvement in 4–6 weeks. AHA 10%: cell renewal in 8–12 days. Real numbers, always.

settings.author: Amara T.
settings.text: I'm a nurse. I read every INCI list. SHIEH is the first brand that hasn't tried to hide a thing. The Niacinamide Gel cleared my texture in three weeks — at a percentage I could actually verify.

settings.author: Caitlin M.
settings.text: Spent years buying £70 serums and not knowing why they weren't working. Turns out: proprietary blends with 0.3% active. SHIEH's Niacinamide Gel listed 5% — on the label. It works.

settings.author: Priya K.
settings.text: The AHA Peel is the first exfoliant I've used without guessing whether the concentration was real. Skin looked genuinely smoother in eight days. I've already sent the link to four friends.

settings.heading: Transparency
settings.content: We list every active ingredient and its clinical concentration on the label and website. No proprietary blends, no hidden formulas. You know exactly what you're putting on your skin.

settings.heading: Quality
settings.content: Made by MĀDARA Cosmetics Group in Latvia — 19 years of organic cosmetic manufacturing expertise. ECOCERT COSMOS certified, vegan, cruelty-free. Every batch tested.

settings.heading: Pricing
settings.content: We don't believe in the luxury markup. Our £24 Niacinamide Gel contains the same 5% concentration as serums sold for £80+. The molecule doesn't know the price tag.

settings.heading: Certifications
settings.content: ECOCERT COSMOS Natural certified. Vegan Society approved. Cruelty-free. Dermatologically tested. No parabens, sulfates, or silicones. Made in EU.

settings.heading: You're Being Lied to by Your Skincare Label.
settings.subheading: Download The INCI Guide — the cosmetic scientist's toolkit for decoding ingredient lists, spotting filler concentrations, and buying skincare that actually works. Free, immediate, no strings.
